game.title.description: Name of the Cascade game card.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Cascade game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Cascade play button.

game.canvasLabel.description: Accessible label for the HTML canvas element — describes game and interaction.

score.label.description: Small uppercase label above the score number.

score.display.description: Accessibility label for the score display container.

preview.dropLabel.description: Small label above the current fruit about to be dropped.

preview.nextLabel.description: Small label above the upcoming fruit.

preview.droppingNext.description: Accessibility label for the drop card.
preview.droppingNext.notes: {{name}} is a fruit name like Cherry — do not translate fruit names.

preview.comingUp.description: Accessibility label for the next card.
preview.comingUp.notes: {{name}} is a fruit name like Cherry — do not translate fruit names.

theme.groupLabel.description: Accessibility label for the fruit theme radio group.

theme.optionLabel.description: Accessibility label for each fruit theme option.
theme.optionLabel.notes: {{label}} is the fruit set name (e.g. Fruits, Tropical).

event.merged.description: Live region announcement when two fruits merge.
event.merged.notes: {{fruit}} is a fruit name — do not translate it.

event.gameOver.description: Live region announcement when the game ends.

gameOver.title.description: Modal heading when the Cascade game ends.

gameOver.scoreLabel.description: Accessibility label for the final score.

gameOver.points.description: Small label below the score number.

gameOver.namePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the name input field.

gameOver.nameLabel.description: Accessibility label for the name input.

gameOver.nameHint.description: Accessibility hint for the name input — explains its purpose.

gameOver.saveLabel.description: Accessibility label for the save score button.

gameOver.saveButton.description: Visible text on the save score button.

gameOver.savedConfirmation.description: Confirmation shown after score is saved. {{rank}} is the leaderboard rank number.

gameOver.playAgain.description: Accessibility label for the play again button.

gameOver.playAgainButton.description: Visible text on the play again button.

scoreboard.heroLabel.description: Short uppercase label above the hero score value.

scoreboard.heroSub.description: Sub-line below the hero score — shows best fruit and merge count.
scoreboard.heroSub.notes: {{bestFruit}} is a fruit name like Cherry — do not translate fruit names.

scoreboard.heroSubEmpty.description: Sub-line shown when no game has been played yet.

scoreboard.bestScore.description: Stat card label for the all-time best score this session.

scoreboard.bestFruit.description: Stat card label for the highest-tier fruit merged this session.

scoreboard.gamesPlayed.description: Stat card label for the number of games completed this session.

scoreboard.totalMerges.description: Stat card label for the total merges in the current game.
